About Me

I'm Kara Bermejo — a designer who believes that great design is equal parts strategy, craft, and empathy.

With a background in visual communication and over six years of experience across branding, product, and web, I partner with startups, studios, and cultural organisations to create work that resonates.

I'm drawn to projects that sit at the intersection of aesthetics and purpose — where thoughtful design can move people to feel, act, or think differently.

Experience

  • Freelance Designer 2022 — Present
  • Senior Designer — Forma Studio 2020 — 2022
  • Designer — Bright & Co 2018 — 2020

Skills

  • Brand Identity
  • UI / UX Design
  • Art Direction
  • Typography
  • Illustration
  • Motion Design
  • Figma
  • HTML & CSS

Let's Connect

I'm always open to interesting collaborations. Whether it's a brand that needs a fresh voice or a product that needs design love — let's talk.

Get in touch
